servinfo.title: ABS Hydraulic Unit / Control Module Assembly On-Vehicle Inspection

item.ptxt: Check ABS hydraulic unit / control module assembly (1) for dents, crack, deformation and leakage.
Check actuator bracket (2) and its mounting surface for dents, crack and deformation.
Check ABS hydraulic unit / control module assembly nuts and actuator bracket bolts for looseness.
Check ABS control module connector (ABS control module side and harness side) and its connector lock mechanism for damage or crack.
Check connector terminals for bend, corrosion or rust.

servinfo.ptxt: Repair or replace defective parts if defective.
